utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format contains 6 items: property; financing; legal_services; moving_services; setup_services; total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 corresponding top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with all details requested by the format: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (type, price, details, location, viewing_date). Fully specified. 
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (type, loan_amount, interest_rate, monthly_payment, arrangement_fee, status). Fully specified. 
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (package, cost, services). Fully specified. 
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (package, cost, details). Fully specified. 
- setup_services: includes utility and setup services (utilities package with cost and services; survey with type, cost, date). Fully specified. 
- total_budget: includes complete cost breakdown (property_cost, additional_services, total_package_cost, and detailed breakdown). Fully specified. Therefore, 6/6 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes specific selections that correspond to entries in the ground-truth ratings: Historic Townhouse (purchase property), Traditional Mortgage (purchase financing), Premium Legal Package (essential legal services), Standard Moving (moving services), Premium Utilities (utility setup), and Full Structural Survey (property surveys). I matched each named item exactly to the ground-truth list and extracted their ratings.
